Codex 使用技巧：Steer 和 Queue

通常 Agent 执行一个任务不会马上结束，可能会要等几分钟甚至更久，如果这时候你有个新的要求想补充，这里有两种方式补充：Steer（任务干预） 和 Queue（排队）。

> Steer（快捷键：Shift + Enter）：在当前任务还没完成时，中途打断 Codex 并给它指引新的方向。 https://t.co/rcyCfs2tYx

昨天这事情发生的时候 庄明浩 也在旁边
要不然可能很多人会觉得是我在编段子...

I tried Google Beam and my mind is absolutely blown. I wanted to ask but I didn’t: “Are you AI?” But he was real like really real. I wish this technology existed when my grandmother was still alive. It feels like talking to someone in the same room. 

#Google

Also I met Alisa who is a beam of light of DeemMind. I met her few months ago online and today we met in person. 

Thank you for being such a supportive person for the AI community! 

I am so glad we met in person! 

#Google https://t.co/d3O3Q8HARB

Big thank you to all the organizers, speakers, staff for amazing Google I/O conference. I had such great time and saw a lot of AI community friends. Feeling so inspired. Usually I am on the other side of the conference (Adobe MAX) and know how much work it takes. THANK YOU ❤️ https://t.co/0ZpQSMd8wL
RT @Bushi__: Tohfa😍 https://t.co/O5II19U17j
I will be teaching three labs on advanced animation with AI at Adobe MAX in Miami this November. Looking forward to see you there.
